steps.title: Apply the "tall" definition
steps.content: A species is tall if its typical fully-grown height is more than 100 cm. So for every value of $h$ in the range, $h > 100$ must hold.

steps.title: Test each range against $h > 100$
steps.content:
A: $107 < h < 158$ — every $h$ here is above $100$. ✓
B: $50 < h < 100$ — none above $100$. ✗
C: $40 < h < 95$ — none above $100$. ✗
D: $16 < h < 91$ — none above $100$. ✗

Only A satisfies the rule. A is correct.
